title: Freelance Web Development Sales Partner Needed
desc:
**Hiring: Freelance Client Acquisition & Deal Closer for Web Development Agency**

We are actively looking for an experienced **Client Acquisition Specialist / Sales Partner** who can represent our company and bring in website development projects.

Our agency has successfully worked with businesses across **Netherlands, Austria, Switzerland, Spain, and India**, delivering professional website solutions for different industries.

Right now, our main focus is on development and project delivery, and due to time limitations we need someone strong in **client handling, communication, and deal closing** who can work on behalf of our company.

### Your Responsibilities:

* Find and approach potential clients who need websites
* Communicate professionally on behalf of our company
* Understand client requirements and pitch our services
* Close deals and secure advance payments
* Hand over complete project details to our development team after onboarding

### What We Need:

* Proven experience in lead generation and closing website deals
* Strong communication and negotiation skills
* Ability to onboard high-quality clients independently
* Knowledge of web development services (Business Websites, E-commerce, Custom Web Apps, etc.)
* Professional and trustworthy approach

### Priority:

If you have experience onboarding clients from **USA, UK, Europe, or other international markets**, that will be a strong advantage, and we are open to paying higher commissions for quality deals.

title: Comprehensive Cocoa Farm Cost Analysis
desc:
I need a clear, data-driven roadmap that shows exactly what it will cost to build a cocoa farm from one hectare all the way to 100 hectares. Please model every stage of development in daily increments so I can see how cash leaves the account each day until the farm is fully established.

Cover the three big spending blocks—land acquisition, labour costs and all equipment & supplies—and be explicit about the timing of each outlay. Where purchase-versus-lease or manual-versus-mechanised options exist, highlight the cost impact so I can compare scenarios instantly.

The numbers have to sit on solid evidence, so weave in up-to-date yield predictions for modern cocoa varieties, current and emerging market trends, and the broader economic impact of the project (ROI, payback period, NPV). Cite every data source so I can trace the assumptions.

Deliverables  
• Excel or Google Sheets cost model with daily cash-flow lines from 1 ha to 100 ha  
• Written report (PDF or Word) that explains methodology, key assumptions, statistical sources and sensitivity analysis  
• Executive summary slide deck (PowerPoint/Keynote) highlighting headline costs, breakeven point and risk factors  

Acceptance criteria  
• Daily expense breakdown is complete and balances across hectares and timeframes  
• Land, labour and equipment figures are internally consistent and source-referenced  
• Statistical data on yields, market trends and economic impact is current (within 12 months) and verifiable

title: LabVIEW Development for Rocket Motor Testing
desc:
I need a LabVIEW application to configure an NI cRIO-9053 for rocket motor testing.

The application should:
- Interface with a load cell for thrust measurements and a pressure transducer for chamber pressure.
- Generate real-time charts.
- Perform the following calculations:
  - Peak thrust measurement
  - Average chamber pressure
  - Total impulse
  - Delivered specific impulse (fuel weight input before the test)

Ideal skills and experience:
- Proficiency in LabVIEW programming
- Experience with NI cRIO systems
- Background in data acquisition and processing
- Familiarity with thrust and pressure measurement instruments

title: Urgent Instagram Ads Manager
desc:
I need someone who can jump straight into Meta Ads Manager and start driving profitable Instagram campaigns for me. The sole objective is to generate leads and sales; vanity metrics are irrelevant. We already know a specific age group responds best, and I’ll share existing data so you can fine-tune the exact bracket before launch.

What I expect from you:
• Full campaign build-out and go-live inside Meta Ads Manager, optimised for conversions  
• Compelling ad creatives and copy (static, carousel, short-form video) tailored to the chosen age segment  
• Continuous A/B testing, budget pacing, and bid optimisation aimed at lowering CPL and boosting ROAS  
• Clear weekly reports that spell out spend, leads, sales, and actionable next steps  

Please tell me how soon you can start, outline the approach you’d take, and quote your price—whether that’s a flat fee, hourly rate, or percentage of ad spend. I’m ready to move quickly once I see a solid plan.

title: Complete Documentary Production Package
desc:
I already have a finished script for a 45-minute MagnatesMedia-style documentary and now I’m turning it into a polished final product.  

What I still need:

• Voice over recorded in clear, neutral English (male or female—either is fine as long as it fits the narrative tone).  
• Full edit that matches the fast-paced, story-driven MagnatesMedia rhythm—snappy cuts, engaging pacing, sound design, and light background music.  
• Sourcing of all visual material: royalty-free stock clips, free-to-use Pokémon footage, and relevant news segments that legally fall under fair use or available public-domain/licensed options.  
• Burn-in and separate .srt subtitles for the entire video.  
• A bold, colorful thumbnail that feels instantly clickable and clearly ties to the documentary’s theme.  

Acceptance criteria  
1. Final video delivered in 4K and 1080p, with clean audio mix and hard/soft subtitles.  
2. VO must be noise-free, well-paced, and synced perfectly to the script.  
3. All footage sources clearly cited so I can confirm licensing.  
4. Thumbnail provided in 1280×720 JPG/PNG with layered PSD or equivalent.  
5. One round of revisions included on both the edit and thumbnail.

If you’ve cut long-form YouTube documentaries before and can replicate that cinematic yet YouTube-friendly flair, I’d love to see a sample of your work and talk timeline.
